scripts.pages-build:
printf "name = "devboxui"
pages_build_output_dir = "dist"
compatibility_date = "2024-09-23"
compatibility_flags = ["nodejs_compat"]

[[kv_namespaces]]
binding = "KV"
id = "${KV_ID}"
" > wrangler.toml && echo 'n' | opennextjs-cloudflare build && rm -rf dist && cp -r .open-next dist && cp -r dist/assets/* dist/ && mv dist/worker.js dist/_worker.js && echo '{"version":1,"include":["/*"],"exclude":["/_next/static/*","/favicon.ico"]}' > dist/_routes.json
scripts.deploy-ssh: cd ssh-worker && npm install && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy-all: npm run deploy && npm run deploy-ssh
